description_long: This armchair features a striking design with a rounded wooden frame and intricately carved armrests that resemble organic tree branches. The seat and inner backrest are upholstered in a bold, solid red fabric, providing a vivid contrast to the natural wood tones. The back of the chair displays a unique panel adorned with a colorful, floral-inspired pattern, adding an artistic touch to the overall appearance. The legs are slender, slightly tapered, and made of wood, seamlessly integrated into the frame. The armrests curve outward and upward, creating an open and inviting seating area. The combination of natural wood, vibrant upholstery, and decorative back panel makes this armchair both functional and visually distinctive, suitable for stylish urban parks or public spaces.
description: A rounded wooden armchair with red upholstered seat and back, featuring branch-like armrests and a decorative floral back panel. The design blends natural wood with bold color and artistic detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red upholstered seat and backrest, with branch-like wooden armrests and open seating area.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the intricate, tree-branch style armrest structure and the curvature of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the decorative floral-patterned back panel and the slender wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the organic armrest design and the red upholstery.
attribute_backrest_style: rounded, mid-height, with solid red upholstery on the inside and a decorative floral panel on the outside
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid red seat and backrest, multicolor floral print on rear panel
